haiku.name: Haiku 4.5
haiku.use: lint, formatting, docs, stubs, trivial well-defined edits

sonnet.name: Sonnet 5
sonnet.use: refactoring, feature work, tests, code review (the default)

opus.name: Opus 4.8
opus.use: architecture, cross-module refactor, novel algorithms, multi-layer debugging

fable.name: Fable 5
fable.use: only the hardest research-grade reasoning — rarely worth it
